fundamentals.name: MongoDB, Inc.
fundamentals.longBusinessSummary: MongoDB, Inc., together with its subsidiaries, provides general purpose database platform worldwide. The company offers MongoDB Atlas, a hosted multi-cloud database-as-a-service solution; MongoDB Enterprise Advanced, a commercial database server for enterprise customers to run in the cloud, on-premises, or in a hybrid environment; and Community Server, a free-to-download version of its database, which includes the functionality that developers need to get started with MongoDB. It offers professional services comprising consulting and training. The company was formerly known as 10gen, Inc. and changed its name to MongoDB, Inc. in August 2013. MongoDB, Inc. was incorporated in 2007 and is headquartered in New York, New York.

judgment.summary: High-growth company with strong revenue expansion and positive free cash flow, but currently unprofitable on a net basis and trading at a premium valuation.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat EPS estimates by 11.5%; next earnings date is 2026-08-26.
positives: Revenue growth 26.7% YoY — strong top-line expansion.
Free cash flow (TTM) $463.32M — generating cash despite net losses.
Gross margin 71.7% — healthy underlying business economics.
Forward P/E 42.50 — reasonable for a company with MDB's growth profile.
Total cash $2.39B vs Total debt $62.83M — strong liquidity position.
negatives: Profit margin -2.9% — currently unprofitable on a net basis.
Return on equity -2.5% and Return on assets -2.4% — negative returns indicate profitability challenges.
Quarterly earnings growth -1.9% — recent earnings trajectory is negative.
Price/Sales (TTM) 10.16 — valuation is on the higher side.

news.paragraph: MongoDB is experiencing a strong positive reaction following its first-quarter results, which surpassed expectations and led to an upward revision of full-year guidance. This positive momentum is further bolstered by multiple analysts raising their price targets, with Wedbush and Oppenheimer increasing theirs to $390 and $410 respectively. Analysts are also highlighting potential AI upside, contributing to a bullish sentiment around the stock.

headlines.title: MDB Maintained by Wedbush -- Price Target Raised to $390
Forget MongoDB: This Free-Cash-Flow Tech Bargain Is a Far Smarter Buy in the Warsh Era
MongoDB climbs after first-quarter beat and stronger full-year guidance (MDB)
MongoDB makes strong start to FY27; analysts identify AI upside
MDB Maintained by Oppenheimer -- Price Target Raised to $410
